news.t: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST FoFs ETFs: YBST and YBTY
GraniteShares Announces the Launch of Two New YieldBOOST Fund-of-Funds ETFs

holdings.infoBox: YBST is an equity ETF with a total of 19 individual holdings.

overview.description: The GraniteShares YieldBoost Single Stock Universe ETF (YBST) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that invests in affiliated YieldBOOST ETFs. The underlying ETFs seek to provide current income and capped gains on select securities through a put option writing strategy. YBST was launched on Dec 16, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.

data.title: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST FoFs ETFs: YBST and YBTY
data.text: New York, June 12, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- GraniteShares today announced the weekly distributions for its GraniteShares YieldBOOST FoFs ETFs: YBST and YBTY as shown in the table below.
